enableBanner.name: Display banners
enableBanner.hint: Displays a banner on critical successes and failures.

enableSound.name: Play sounds
enableSound.hint: Plays a sound when a banner is displayed.

criticalSoundPath.name: Custom sound – critical success
criticalSoundPath.hint: Leave empty to use the default sound. Only the GM can choose a custom audio file.

fumbleSoundPath.name: Custom sound – critical failure
fumbleSoundPath.hint: Leave empty to use the default sound. Only the GM can choose a custom audio file.

criticalExitEffect.name: Exit effect – critical success
criticalExitEffect.hint: Selects the banner disappearance animation for a critical success.

fumbleExitEffect.name: Exit effect – critical failure
fumbleExitEffect.hint: Selects the banner disappearance animation for a critical failure.

bannerScale.name: Banner size
bannerScale.hint: Adjusts banner size as a percentage.

useCustomPos.name: Use Custom Position
useCustomPos.hint: Display banners around a user-defined screen position.

pickPosition.name: Banner position
pickPosition.label: Configure
pickPosition.hint: Opens the visual banner placement tool.

positionPicker.title: Banner position
positionPicker.description: Place the banner on screen using a real preview.
positionPicker.help: Move the mouse to position the banner, click to confirm, Escape to cancel.
positionPicker.managerError: Unable to initialize the banner manager.
